summary: Completed comprehensive Phase 2 QA testing of TrustOffice's Structural Separation & Commingling Monitoring feature set. All 29 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Transaction Ledger, Separation Dashboard, Alert Resolution workflow, Governance Health with 7 criteria, Entity Detail pages, and Audit Defense Report button all working correctly.

issues: Console warning: HTML hydration error - <tr> cannot be child of <span> - appears to be from dev tooling wrapper (x-ve-dynamic), not affecting functionality
Header shows '7-CRITERIA ASSESSMENT' which is correct (fixed from previous iteration)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test data from previous iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Comprehensive QA complete. All features verified working: (1) Transaction Ledger - manual entry, CSV import, bulk classify, filtering all work. (2) Alert Detection - 7 alert types trigger correctly, resolution workflow works, audit trail preserved. (3) Health Score - 7 criteria displayed correctly including Transaction Classification and Separation Alert Health. (4) Separation Dashboard - entity cards with alert badges, inter-entity flows table, overview stats. (5) Entity Detail - entity-scoped alerts and transactions. (6) Audit Defense PDF - endpoint returns valid PDF with all sections.

features_verified.LEDGER - Manual entry: PASS - Create transaction with all fields works
features_verified.LEDGER - Per-entity scoping: PASS - Transactions filtered by entity correctly
features_verified.LEDGER - CSV Import: PASS - Import rows appear in ledger
features_verified.LEDGER - Bulk classification: PASS - Multiple transactions classified at once
features_verified.ALERTS - Trust paying personal: PASS - Red alert triggered for personal destination
features_verified.ALERTS - Large unexplained: PASS - Yellow alert for $10k+ Other with no memo
features_verified.ALERTS - Unlinked distribution: PASS - Yellow alert for Distribution without link
features_verified.ALERTS - Unlinked compensation: PASS - Yellow alert for Compensation without link
features_verified.ALERTS - No false positive: PASS - Clean transaction does NOT trigger alert
features_verified.ALERTS - Resolve with note: PASS - Resolution with type + note succeeds
features_verified.HEALTH SCORE - Red alerts decrease score: PASS - Separation Alert Health = 0pts with red alerts
features_verified.DASHBOARD - Separation tab: PASS - Overview stats, entity cards, inter-entity flows
features_verified.AUDIT PDF - Generation: PASS - Returns valid PDF with all sections
features_verified.AUDIT PDF - Button: PASS - 'AUDIT DEFENSE REPORT' button on separation tab
features_verified.EDGE - Data isolation: PASS - Trust A transactions not visible in Trust B
